title: SirJBiscuit/automatic-system
summary: Complete Pterodactyl Panel & Wings automation suite with P.R.I.S.M AI assistant. Features auto-installation, Discord notifications, system monitoring, predictive maintenance, and interactive tutorials. One-line install for Ubuntu/Debian.

title: chf3198/megingjord-harness
summary: AI agent governance harness: baton workflow, fleet LLM routing (Ollama/Claude/OpenRouter), and CI gates for Copilot, Claude Code, and Codex.

title: denn-gubsky/loomcycle
summary: The runtime substrate for agentic systems — one Go binary, six LLM providers, MCP-native, configurable as a managed sandbox or full agentic dev environment. Where agents live, talk, and learn.

title: Oolab-labs/patchwork-os
summary: personal AI runtime, local-first. MCP bridge giving Claude Code 170+ tools (LSP, debugger, terminal, git) inside VS Code, Cursor, Windsurf, or JetBrains. Optional Patchwork layer adds YAML recipes, an approval queue, and an oversight dashboard. Your models, your machine, your policy.

title: LearningCircuit/local-deep-research
summary: ~95% on SimpleQA (e.g. Qwen3.6-27B on a 3090). Supports all local and cloud LLMs (llama.cpp, Ollama, Google, ...). 10+ search engines - arXiv, PubMed, your private documents. Everything Local & Encrypted.

title: HamdiBelhaj0013/Esprit-PIDEV-3A33-2026-LingualearnJava
summary: This project was developed as part of the PIDEV – 3rd Year Engineering Program at Esprit School of Engineering (Academic Year 2025–2026). LinguaLearn is a full-stack language learning platform

title: YanCheng-go/my-focal-ai
summary: Personal news intelligence — aggregate AI content from curated sources, score with LLM, serve your own dashboard

title: blazux/prism
summary: Programmable Responsive Interface for Smart Models

title: repairman29/chump
summary: Self-hosted AI coding agent with persistent memory and bounded autonomy. Local-first, your keys, your data. Written in Rust.

title: codebudy5247/ai-interview-coach
summary: Practice mock interviews. Get AI-powered feedback.

title: adwibha/cortex-api
summary: Production-grade AI workflow API platform built with FastAPI, PostgreSQL + pgvector, Redis, and Ollama. Features async I/O, JWT dual-token auth, RBAC, rate limiting, idempotency keys, semantic search, multi-agent pipeline, OpenTelemetry tracing, and Prometheus metrics - fully Dockerized.

title: kagura-ai/memory-cloud
summary: Adaptive AI Memory Platform — Self-hosted MCP server that gets smarter as you use it. Hybrid search, neural memory graph, AI reranking, and web UI. Built with FastAPI, Next.js, PostgreSQL, and Qdrant.

title: itsabunny/Local-Friend
summary: A local AI assistant as a digital pet. Analyzes your screen in real-time using a local VLM — without sending any data to the cloud. Thesis project.

title: Peuqui/AIfred-Intelligence
summary: 🤵 AIfred-Intelligence — self-hosted Multi-Agent Assistant with Debate Modes (Symposion/Tribunal), Voice (STT + Streaming-TTS), RAG with Long-Term Memory, Web Research and Tool-Calling. Reachable via Web-UI or Telegram/Discord/Email/EPIM. Multi-Backend: llama-swap, Ollama, vLLM, TabbyAPI.

title: tobocop2/lilbee
summary: Terminal-first local search and AI chat over your documents, code, and crawled websites. Semantic + hybrid search, vision OCR, auto-built wiki, browsable GGUF model catalog. Works as CLI, TUI, MCP server, REST API, or Python library. Offline by default, no sidecar services.

title: NotSleeply/ClawBoard
summary: 🧠 AI驱动的本地剪贴板管理器 - 智能记录、语义搜索、永久收藏

title: dcash10181-gh/swiftforge-llm
summary: Free, local iOS LLM built on Phi-3-mini — Swift/SwiftUI specialist with native OpenClaw MCP integration

title: zs001-agi/asi-api
summary: Wutong ASI API: self-evolving AI, 5 local models, pay-per-token. 🧬 Powered by asi-evolve & code-opt-ai

title: evertonsjjj/vouch
summary: Curated AI search for agents. Bring your own sources, your own LLM. Self-hosted Python alternative to Tavily and Perplexity.

title: kilroy-fr/ki-forms
summary: Automatisierte PDF-Formularverarbeitung mit KI (OCR + lokales LLM via Ollama)
